name: Dog Pooch Munchies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. In a large bowl, combine the flour and garlic salt. Stir in the bacon fat. Add the shredded cheese and egg. Gradually add milk until a dough forms. Knead the dough and roll it out to about 1 inch thick.
3. Use a dog bone cookie cutter to cut out the dough shapes. Place them on a greased cookie sheet. Bake for about 12 minutes, or until they start to brown. Cool and serve.
